message:
fix(mcp,storage): harden MCP tools and fix events schema default

mcp/tools:
- Fix char literal: use 'z' instead of "z" in ends_with for timestamp parsing
- Add title length validation (1-500 chars) in parse_update_fields
- Auto-enable include_closed filter when status filter explicitly
  includes Closed, preventing zero-result contradictions
- Improve comment clarity for the "forgive by default" filter logic

storage/events:
- Add DEFAULT '' to actor column in events table CREATE statement,
  preventing NOT NULL constraint failures on system-generated events

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -22,7 +22,7 @@ CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS events (
     id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY AUTOINCREMENT,
     issue_id TEXT NOT NULL,
     event_type TEXT NOT NULL,
-    actor TEXT NOT NULL,
+    actor TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '',
     old_value TEXT,
     new_value TEXT,
     comment TEXT,
